title: The smolagents bug that made my agent retry the same valid code three times
excerpt: Third entry in the DEV x Sentry Bug Smash. Entry 1 was a crash with a confusing message. Entry 2 was...
content_html:
This is a submission for DEV's Summer Bug Smash: Clear the Lineup powered by Sentry.

Third entry in the DEV x Sentry Bug Smash. Entry 1 was a crash with a confusing message. Entry 2 was a freeze the timeout could not catch. This one is quieter and sneakier: valid Python that the sandbox rejects with an error pointing at the wrong thing entirely.

When the open issues run out, fuzz

By entry 3 every obvious open smolagents bug was already claimed or had a competing PR. So instead of reading the issue tracker I pointed a small fuzzer at the piece of smolagents that runs the most untrusted code: LocalPythonExecutor, the sandbox that executes model-generated Python.

The method is boring and effective: feed it ordinary, valid Python one snippet at a time, and flag anything that raises InterpreterError. Valid Python that the sandbox refuses to run is, by definition, a bug, because the model writes valid Python and expects it to work.

That surfaced four unreported bugs in one afternoon. This post is about the one I shipped: dict unpacking.

The bug 

config = {**{"temperature": 0.7, "max_tokens": 512}, "top_p": 0.9}

Merging dicts with ** is one of the most common things an LLM writes. Under smolagents it fails with:

InterpreterError: NoneType is not supported.

There is no None anywhere in that line. The message sends you looking for a null value that does not exist.

Why it happens

In Python's AST, a dict literal keeps its keys and values in two parallel lists. For a normal entry the key is an AST node. For a **mapping spread entry, the key is literally None, a signal that says "this is a spread, not a key/value pair."

smolagents evaluated every key by walking expression.keys and calling evaluate_ast(key, ...) on each one. When the key is None, that call falls through every isinstance branch to the catch-all raise InterpreterError(f"{type} is not supported"). So the spread marker got evaluated as if it were an expression, and the model got blamed for a None it never wrote.

Why silence is the expensive part

Here is the part the Sentry view made obvious. The error is handled: the agent catches it and feeds it back to the model as "here is what went wrong, try again." But the message names NoneType, and the model's code has no None, so the model cannot act on it. It retries the exact same valid syntax. And again. Every step burns a real LLM call and a slot in the step budget until the run gives up.

One bug, one misleading message, three identical failures:

Three events on a single issue is not noise. It is the agent stuck in a loop, and without Sentry counting the events you would never see the loop, only a run that quietly underperformed. Sentry's Seer read the same event and reached the exact root cause:

smolagents' LocalPythonExecutor doesn't handle dict unpacking (**) syntax: None keys in ast.Dict cause an unsupported type error. [...] evaluate_ast(None, ...) matches no isinstance branch and falls to the else clause. The interpreter raises InterpreterError: NoneType is not supported, the agent retries with identical code, burning steps in a loop.

The fix

Evaluate the dict pairwise instead of evaluating keys blindly. A None key means "merge this mapping":

result = {}
for key_node, value_node in zip(expression.keys, expression.values):
    if key_node is None:
        value = evaluate_ast(value_node, *common_params)
        if not hasattr(value, "keys"):
            raise InterpreterError(f"'{type(value).__name__}' object is not a mapping")
        result.update(value)
    else:
        key = evaluate_ast(key_node, *common_params)
        result[key] = evaluate_ast(value_node, *common_params)
return result

This matches CPython exactly: spreads merge in order, later keys win, and unpacking a non-mapping raises 'list' object is not a mapping.

A reviewer caught my fix being too strict

I first gated the spread on isinstance(value, Mapping). Minutes after the PR opened, OpenAI's Codex reviewer flagged it (P2): CPython does not require the Mapping ABC, it only requires an object with a keys() method. Since the sandbox lets users define their own classes, a duck-typed mapping with keys() and __getitem__() would have been wrongly rejected. I switched the check to hasattr(value, "keys") and added a test for exactly that case. AI wrote the code, AI reviewed the code, I kept score.

After

On the patched build the same line just runs:

app: step 1 ok, config = {'temperature': 0.7, 'max_tokens': 512, 'top_p': 0.9}

One step, no loop, no phantom None.

Numbers

  • 4 unreported bugs found by fuzzing valid Python through the sandbox; this is the first fix
  • Misleading NoneType error reproduced on current main and 1.26.0
  • 3 wasted agent steps per occurrence, visible only because Sentry counts events
  • 9 new tests: spreads, double spreads, override order both ways, a duck-typed mapping class, empty spread, non-mapping rejection
  • 406 passing, ruff clean

Links

  • Issue: https://github.com/huggingface/smolagents/issues/2552
  • PR: https://github.com/huggingface/smolagents/pull/2553

The pattern across all three entries: the worst agent bugs do not throw a red stack trace at you. They hand the model a plausible-but-wrong message and let it fail politely, on repeat. Count your events.

blocks.html_en: This is a submission for DEV's Summer Bug Smash: Clear the Lineup powered by Sentry.

sentences.zh: 这是为 DEV 的 Summer Bug Smash: Clear the Lineup 提交的内容，由 Sentry 提供支持。

blocks.html_en: Third entry in the DEV x Sentry Bug Smash. Entry 1 was a crash with a confusing message. Entry 2 was a freeze the timeout could not catch. This one is quieter and sneakier: valid Python that the sandbox rejects with an error pointing at the wrong thing entirely.

sentences.en: Third entry in the DEV x Sentry Bug Smash.
sentences.zh: DEV x Sentry Bug Smash 中的第三个条目。

sentences.en: Entry 1 was a crash with a confusing message.
sentences.zh: 条目 1 是一次崩溃，并带有令人困惑的消息。

sentences.en: Entry 2 was a freeze the timeout could not catch.
sentences.zh: 条目 2 是超时无法捕获的冻结。

sentences.en: This one is quieter and sneakier: valid Python that the sandbox rejects with an error pointing at the wrong thing entirely.
sentences.zh: 这个更安静、更狡猾：沙箱拒绝有效的 Python，并给出完全错误的错误。

blocks.html_en: When the open issues run out, fuzz

sentences.en: When the open issues run out, fuzz
sentences.zh: 当未解决的问题用完时，模糊化

blocks.html_en: By entry 3 every obvious open smolagents bug was already claimed or had a competing PR. So instead of reading the issue tracker I pointed a small fuzzer at the piece of smolagents that runs the most untrusted code: LocalPythonExecutor, the sandbox that executes model-generated Python.

sentences.en: By entry 3 every obvious open smolagents bug was already claimed or had a competing PR.
sentences.zh: 到第 3 条时，每个明显的开放式 smolagents bug 都已被声明或具有竞争性 PR。

sentences.en: So instead of reading the issue tracker I pointed a small fuzzer at the piece of smolagents that runs the most untrusted code: LocalPythonExecutor, the sandbox that executes model-generated Python.
sentences.zh: 因此，我没有阅读问题跟踪器，而是将一个小模糊器指向运行最不受信任的代码的 smolagents：LocalPythonExecutor，执行模型生成的 Python 的沙箱。

blocks.html_en: The method is boring and effective: feed it ordinary, valid Python one snippet at a time, and flag anything that raises InterpreterError. Valid Python that the sandbox refuses to run is, by definition, a bug, because the model writes valid Python and expects it to work.

sentences.en: The method is boring and effective: feed it ordinary, valid Python one snippet at a time, and flag anything that raises InterpreterError.
sentences.zh: 该方法很无聊，但很有效：一次向其提供普通、有效的 Python 代码片段，并标记任何引发 InterpreterError 的内容。

sentences.en: Valid Python that the sandbox refuses to run is, by definition, a bug, because the model writes valid Python and expects it to work.
sentences.zh: 根据定义，沙箱拒绝运行的有效 Python 是一个错误，因为模型编写了有效的 Python 并期望它能够工作。

blocks.html_en: That surfaced four unreported bugs in one afternoon. This post is about the one I shipped: dict unpacking.

sentences.en: That surfaced four unreported bugs in one afternoon.
sentences.zh: 一下午就出现了四个未报告的错误。

sentences.en: The message sends you looking for a null value that does not exist.
sentences.zh: 该消息会发送您寻找不存在的空值。

blocks.html_en: Why it happens

sentences.en: Why it happens
sentences.zh: 为什么会发生这种情况

blocks.html_en: In Python's AST, a dict literal keeps its keys and values in two parallel lists. For a normal entry the key is an AST node. For a **mapping spread entry, the key is literally None, a signal that says "this is a spread, not a key/value pair."

sentences.en: In Python's AST, a dict literal keeps its keys and values in two parallel lists.
sentences.zh: 在 Python 的 AST 中，字典文字将其键和值保存在两个并行列表中。

sentences.en: For a normal entry the key is an AST node.
sentences.zh: 对于普通条目，键是 AST 节点。

sentences.en: For a **mapping spread entry, the key is literally None, a signal that says "this is a spread, not a key/value pair."
sentences.zh: 对于 **mapping spread 条目，键实际上是 None，这是一个信号，表示“这是一个 spread，而不是键/值对”。

blocks.html_en: smolagents evaluated every key by walking expression.keys and calling evaluate_ast(key, ...) on each one. When the key is None, that call falls through every isinstance branch to the catch-all raise InterpreterError(f"{type} is not supported"). So the spread marker got evaluated as if it were an expression, and the model got blamed for a None it never wrote.

sentences.en: smolagents evaluated every key by walking expression.keys and calling evaluate_ast(key, ...)
sentences.zh: smolagents 通过遍历 expression.keys 并调用 evaluate_ast(key, ...) 来评估每个键

sentences.en: on each one.
sentences.zh: 在每一个上。

sentences.en: When the key is None, that call falls through every isinstance branch to the catch-all raise InterpreterError(f"{type} is not supported").
sentences.zh: 当键为 None 时，该调用会通过每个 isinstance 分支到达包罗万象的 raise InterpreterError(f"{type} is not support")。

sentences.en: So the spread marker got evaluated as if it were an expression, and the model got blamed for a None it never wrote.
sentences.zh: 因此，扩展标记就像一个表达式一样被评估，并且模型因它从未编写的 None 而受到指责。

blocks.html_en: Why silence is the expensive part

sentences.en: Why silence is the expensive part
sentences.zh: 为什么沉默是最昂贵的部分

blocks.html_en: Here is the part the Sentry view made obvious. The error is handled: the agent catches it and feeds it back to the model as "here is what went wrong, try again." But the message names NoneType, and the model's code has no None, so the model cannot act on it. It retries the exact same valid syntax. And again. Every step burns a real LLM call and a slot in the step budget until the run gives up.

sentences.en: Here is the part the Sentry view made obvious.
sentences.zh: 这是哨兵视图中显而易见的部分。

sentences.en: The error is handled: the agent catches it and feeds it back to the model as "here is what went wrong, try again."
sentences.zh: 错误被处理：代理捕获它并将其反馈给模型，因为“这里出了问题，请重试。”

sentences.en: But the message names NoneType, and the model's code has no None, so the model cannot act on it.
sentences.zh: 但消息名称为 NoneType，而模型的代码中没有 None，因此模型无法对其进行操作。

sentences.en: It retries the exact same valid syntax.
sentences.zh: 它重试完全相同的有效语法。

sentences.en: And again.
sentences.zh: 又来了。

sentences.en: Every step burns a real LLM call and a slot in the step budget until the run gives up.
sentences.zh: 每一步都会消耗一次真正的 LLM 调用和步骤预算中的一个槽位，直到运行放弃。

sentences.en: Sentry's Seer read the same event and reached the exact root cause:
sentences.zh: Sentry 的 Seer 读取了相同的事件并找到了确切的根本原因：

sentences.zh: 我将检查切换为 hasattr(value, "keys") 并添加了针对这种情况的测试。

blocks.html_en: The pattern across all three entries: the worst agent bugs do not throw a red stack trace at you. They hand the model a plausible-but-wrong message and let it fail politely, on repeat. Count your events.

sentences.en: The pattern across all three entries: the worst agent bugs do not throw a red stack trace at you.
sentences.zh: 所有三个条目的模式：最严重的代理错误不会向您抛出红色堆栈跟踪。

sentences.en: They hand the model a plausible-but-wrong message and let it fail politely, on repeat.
sentences.zh: 他们向模型传递了一条看似合理但错误的信息，然后礼貌地让它失败，如此重复。

sentences.en: Count your events.
sentences.zh: 计算你的事件。

content_html_zh:
这是为 DEV 的 Summer Bug Smash: Clear the Lineup 提交的内容，由 Sentry 提供支持。

DEV x Sentry Bug Smash 中的第三个条目。 条目 1 是一次崩溃，并带有令人困惑的消息。 条目 2 是超时无法捕获的冻结。 这个更安静、更狡猾：沙箱拒绝有效的 Python，并给出完全错误的错误。

当未解决的问题用完时，模糊化

到第 3 条时，每个明显的开放式 smolagents bug 都已被声明或具有竞争性 PR。 因此，我没有阅读问题跟踪器，而是将一个小模糊器指向运行最不受信任的代码的 smolagents：LocalPythonExecutor，执行模型生成的 Python 的沙箱。

该方法很无聊，但很有效：一次向其提供普通、有效的 Python 代码片段，并标记任何引发 InterpreterError 的内容。 根据定义，沙箱拒绝运行的有效 Python 是一个错误，因为模型编写了有效的 Python 并期望它能够工作。

一下午就出现了四个未报告的错误。 这篇文章是关于我发布的：dict 拆包。

错误

config = {**{"temperature": 0.7, "max_tokens": 512}, "top_p": 0.9}

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

将字典与 ** 合并是法学硕士最常见的事情之一。 在 smolagents 下它会失败：

InterpreterError: NoneType is not supported.

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

该行中没有任何地方。 该消息会发送您寻找不存在的空值。

为什么会发生这种情况

在 Python 的 AST 中，字典文字将其键和值保存在两个并行列表中。 对于普通条目，键是 AST 节点。 对于 **mapping spread 条目，键实际上是 None，这是一个信号，表示“这是一个 spread，而不是键/值对”。

smolagents 通过遍历 expression.keys 并调用 evaluate_ast(key, ...) 来评估每个键 在每一个上。 当键为 None 时，该调用会通过每个 isinstance 分支到达包罗万象的 raise InterpreterError(f"{type} is not support")。 因此，扩展标记就像一个表达式一样被评估，并且模型因它从未编写的 None 而受到指责。

为什么沉默是最昂贵的部分

这是哨兵视图中显而易见的部分。 错误被处理：代理捕获它并将其反馈给模型，因为“这里出了问题，请重试。” 但消息名称为 NoneType，而模型的代码中没有 None，因此模型无法对其进行操作。 它重试完全相同的有效语法。 又来了。 每一步都会消耗一次真正的 LLM 调用和步骤预算中的一个槽位，直到运行放弃。

一个错误，一条误导性消息，三个相同的失败：

同一个问题上的三个事件并不是噪音。 它是陷入循环的代理，如果没有 Sentry 计算事件，您将永远不会看到循环，而只是悄悄表现不佳的运行。 Sentry 的 Seer 读取了相同的事件并找到了确切的根本原因：

smolagents 的 LocalPythonExecutor 不处理字典解包 (**) 语法：ast.Dict 中的无键会导致不支持的类型错误。 [...] 评估_ast（无，...） 不匹配 isinstance 分支并落入 else 子句。 解释器引发 InterpreterError：不支持 NoneType，代理使用相同的代码重试，在循环中燃烧步骤。

修复

成对地评估字典而不是盲目地评估键。 None 键表示“合并此映射”：

result = {}
for key_node, value_node in zip(expression.keys, expression.values):
    if key_node is None:
        value = evaluate_ast(value_node, *common_params)
        if not hasattr(value, "keys"):
            raise InterpreterError(f"'{type(value).__name__}' object is not a mapping")
        result.update(value)
    else:
        key = evaluate_ast(key_node, *common_params)
        result[key] = evaluate_ast(value_node, *common_params)
return result

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

这与 CPython 完全匹配：按顺序展开合并，后面的键获胜，解压非映射会引发“列表”对象不是映射。

审稿人发现我的修复过于严格

我首先对 isinstance(value, Mapping) 进行门控。 PR 开启几分钟后，OpenAI 的 Codex 审阅者对其进行了标记（P2）：CPython 不需要 Mapping ABC，它只需要一个带有 keys() 方法的对象。 由于沙箱允许用户定义自己的类，因此带有 keys() 和 __getitem__() 的鸭子类型映射将被错误地拒绝。 我将检查切换为 hasattr(value, "keys") 并添加了针对这种情况的测试。 人工智能编写代码，人工智能审查代码，我记分。

After

在修补后的版本上，同一行只运行：

app: step 1 ok, config = {'temperature': 0.7, 'max_tokens': 512, 'top_p': 0.9}

进入全屏模式 退出全屏模式

一步，无循环，无幻影 None。

数字

  • 通过沙箱模糊有效Python发现的4个未报告的错误；这是第一个修复
  • 当前 main 和 1.26.0 上重现了误导性的 NoneType 错误
  • 每次发生 3 个浪费的代理步骤，仅因为 Sentry 对事件进行计数而可见
  • 9 个新测试：价差、双重价差、双向覆盖订单、鸭子类型映射类、空价差、非映射拒绝
  • 406 传递，颈圈干净

Links

  • 问题：https://github.com/huggingface/smolagents/issues/2552
  • 公关：https://github.com/huggingface/smolagents/pull/2553

所有三个条目的模式：最严重的代理错误不会向您抛出红色堆栈跟踪。 他们向模型传递了一条看似合理但错误的信息，然后礼貌地让它失败，如此重复。 计算你的事件。
